title: Cryptool selects MultiversX as its main chain
content_html:
After months of evaluation, Cryptool has chosen MultiversX as its main chain partner.

The decision came down to performance and developer experience: fast finality, low fees and a tight integration story that will sit behind the upcoming Raise and Portfolio modules. MultiversX is supporting the build with ecosystem grants, accelerating the timeline to launch.

For Cryptool users, this translates into cheaper, faster on-chain operations and a deep tie-in with the MultiversX ecosystem when looking for new investment opportunities.

The first modules built on this foundation, Raise and Portfolio, go live in the coming weeks.
